response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-stack experience, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT architecture, UML modeling, and team management at an executive level, and his German proficiency is only basic — a critical requirement for client advisory and compliance roles.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse technologies (DLang, TypeScript, Linux, Docker)
Strong track record of mentoring and creating technical workshops/courses
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, falling short of C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML modeling, IT architecture design, or requirements management in leadership context
Lacks documented experience managing teams or leading client-facing technical strategy
